heading: Treatment of generation-skipping transfer tax
label: 2515 Treatment of generation-skipping transfer tax
text: In the case of any taxable gift which is a direct skip (within the meaning of chapter 13), the amount of such gift shall be increased by the amount of any tax imposed on the transferor under chapter 13 with respect to such gift.
